headline: Tyson Foods (TSN) Stock Trades Up, Here Is Why
summary: Shares of meat company Tyson Foods (NYSE:TSN) jumped 2.7% in the afternoon session after Mizuho initiated coverage on the stock with an "Outperform" rating and set a price target of $72.00.
